title: Cross-Site Scripting Scanner
content:
# Cross-Site Scripting Scanner

This skill identifies XSS vulnerabilities in web applications.

## Features
- DOM-based XSS detection
- Reflected XSS detection
- Stored XSS detection
- Context-aware payload generation

## Usage
```
run xss_scanner --url "http://example.com/search" --method GET
```

## Notes
Use only on authorized targets.
